query: SELECT a.id, cv.title, cv.upload_date, a.analysis_result FROM analyses a JOIN channel_videos cv ON cv.analysis_id = a.id WHERE cv.upload_date >= '2026-03-09' ORDER BY cv.upload_date DESC LIMIT 5;
